stories.name: update-rust-defaults
stories.title: Update launch_args.rs defaults and tests to match CLI/TS smallest resolutions
stories.description: Change get_default_resolution in launch_args.rs to return the first (smallest) resolution for each aspect ratio (matching cli.py SUPPORTED_RATIOS[ratio][0]). Update the unit test assertions. Add a note to specs/spec.md that the first resolution in each ratio list is the default.
stories.notes: Purely mechanical: change 5 number pairs in launch_args.rs and update 5 test assertions. Also add one note to spec.md.
